brand.name: EvidaraOS
brand.descriptor: Precision evidence operating system for life sciences teams
brand.runtime_note: Built on the credited DeerFlow open-source agent runtime/harness.

hero.headline: Precision evidence generation for life sciences.
hero.subheadline: EvidaraOS helps evidence, HEOR, regulatory, and market access teams turn biomedical literature, clinical evidence, and real-world data into traceable, validation-ready evidence workflows.

problem.headline: Evidence work is slowed by noise, fragmentation, and weak provenance.
points: Manual literature review creates large screening burden.
Clinical, economic, payer, and regulatory evidence often live in disconnected artifacts.
AI-assisted outputs are hard to trust without human review, validation, and audit trails.

workflow.headline: From question to audit-ready evidence package.

governance.headline: Human oversight is part of the product, not an afterthought.
points: Validation reports with fixture-only warnings when applicable.
Audit trails with source provenance, tool metadata, and project manifests.

routes.title: Platform
routes.headline: Evidence workflows with traceability built in.
routes.summary: EvidaraOS connects question framing, biomedical retrieval, evidence mapping, extraction, human review, validation, reporting, and audit trails across life-sciences evidence workflows.

routes.title: Precision Literature Review
routes.headline: Control recall, precision, and screening burden.

routes.title: HEOR Evidence Modeler
routes.headline: Prepare traceable HEOR model inputs for expert review.

routes.title: Payer Value Dossier Builder
routes.headline: Build payer evidence packages with claim traceability.

routes.title: Drug Repurposing Evidence Explorer
routes.headline: Explore repurposing hypotheses through transparent evidence paths.

routes.title: Evidence Engine
routes.headline: Retrieval, evidence maps, provenance, and governed artifacts.
routes.summary: The EvidenceOS engine organizes records, claims, parameters, findings, and graph paths into structured artifacts that can be reviewed, validated, and audited.

routes.title: Governance
routes.headline: Validation-ready controls for AI-assisted evidence work.

routes.title: Data and Methodology
routes.headline: Transparent sources, limitations, and no unsupported claims.
routes.summary: EvidenceOS workflows use public biomedical and evidence sources where configured. Demo data is fixture-only and never validation evidence.

routes.title: Request a Demo
routes.headline: See governed evidence workflows for your team.
routes.summary: The initial demo should show configured workflows and fixture-labeled examples only until live execution and validated benchmark data are available.

language_guardrails: Do not claim regulatory-grade, publication-grade, or validated performance without benchmark evidence.
Do not claim access to proprietary real-world data networks unless integrated.
Do not expose raw DeerFlow skill names as public product navigation.
Do not describe AI as autonomous decision-making for clinical, regulatory, payer, or development decisions.
